title: Notifications - Onboarding - Allow, UI
scenario: Notification master toggle and individual settings are not properly displayed after onboarding in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted, tap "Allow" to grant notification permissions.
4. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon (☰) or your profile avatar to open the side navigation.
expected: A master toggle for "Notifications" is present and set to ON. Individual notification settings (e.g., call alerts, firmware updates, promotional offers) are visible and can be toggled independently.
